name: KFORCE INC
business: Kforce Inc. is a solutions firm specializing in technology, finance and accounting, and other professional staffing services. It provides temporary (Flex) staffing, solutions-oriented engagements, and Direct Hire placements to Fortune 500 and other leading companies. Over 93% of revenue is concentrated in technology staffing and solutions.

exposures.sentence: Kforce Inc., along with its subsidiaries, is a solutions firm specializing in technology, finance and accounting, and other professional staffing services.

We deliver talent solutions to our clients across a range of highly skilled disciplines including, but not limited to, systems and applications architecture and development (mobility and web); data management and analytics; cloud architecture and engineering; business and artificial intelligence ( AI ); machine learning; project and program management; and network architecture and security.

We deliver talent solutions to our clients across a range of highly skilled disciplines including, but not limited to, systems and applications architecture and development (mobility and web); data management and analytics; cloud architecture and engineering; business and artificial intelligence ( AI ); machine learning; project and program management; and network architecture and security.

We deliver talent solutions to our clients across a range of highly skilled disciplines including, but not limited to, systems and applications architecture and development (mobility and web); data management and analytics; cloud architecture and engineering; business and artificial intelligence ( AI ); machine learning; project and program management; and network architecture and security.

We deliver talent solutions to our clients across a range of highly skilled disciplines including, but not limited to, systems and applications architecture and development (mobility and web); data management and analytics; cloud architecture and engineering; business and artificial intelligence ( AI ); machine learning; project and program management; and network architecture and security.

catalysts.event: Knowledgeforce India began supporting engagements for U.S. clients
catalysts.sentence: Beginning in January 2025, Knowledgeforce India began supporting engagements with our U.S. clients.
We made significant progress related to the implementation of Workday over the last few years with our expected go-live event to be in early 2027.

tamClaims.claim: Technology temporary staffing industry projected to generate $38 billion in 2026; finance and accounting temporary staffing industry projected to generate $8 billion in 2026
tamClaims.sentence: According to the September 2025 report published by Staffing Industry Analysts (SIA), the technology temporary staffing industry and finance and accounting temporary staffing industry are projected to generate revenues of $38 billion and $8 billion, respectively, in 2026.

tamClaims.claim: Technology services and solutions market greater than $750 billion
tamClaims.sentence: IBISWorld has indicated it is greater than $750 billion.
